title: Log in with valid credentials and land on pipeline
description: Verifies that a user can log in with valid credentials and reach the protected pipeline dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the pipeline dashboard
Verify deals pipeline content is displayed

title: Log in with invalid credentials shows an error
description: Verifies that invalid login attempts show an invalid-credentials error state.

steps.description: Fill invalid_user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrongpassword123 into the password field
Verify an invalid credentials error message is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Register with valid details redirects to login with success confirmation
description: Verifies that a new user can register and is redirected to the login page with a success notification.

steps.description: Fill testuser+{{TIMESTAMP}}@example.com into the email field
Fill ValidPass!234 into the password field
Verify the user lands on the login page
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Registration with missing required field shows validation error
description: Verifies that the registration form enforces required fields and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill testuser+{{TIMESTAMP}}@example.com into the email field
Verify a validation error message is visible
Verify the user remains on the registration page

title: Create a new contact and see it in the list
description: Verifies end-to-end contact creation from the contacts page and that the new contact appears in the list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the contacts page
Fill Contact {{TIMESTAMP}} into the contact name field
Fill contact{{TIMESTAMP}}@example.com into the contact email field

title: Edit an existing contact and see updates in the list
description: Verifies that a user can open a contact, modify fields, save, and see the updated values reflected in the contacts list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the contacts page
Click a contact in the list
Fill Updated Contact {{TIMESTAMP}} into the contact name field
Verify the contacts list includes "Updated Contact {{TIMESTAMP}}"

title: Contact creation with missing required field shows validation error
description: Verifies that required contact fields are validated and prevent saving when missing.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the contacts page
Fill  into the contact name field
Verify a validation error message is visible
Verify the new contact is not added to the contacts list

title: Delete a contact and confirm it is removed from the list
description: Verifies that deleting a contact removes it from the contacts list after confirming the deletion.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the contacts page
Verify the deleted contact is removed from the contacts list

title: Create a new company and see it in the list
description: Verifies end-to-end company creation and that the new company appears in the companies list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the companies page
Fill Company {{TIMESTAMP}} into the company name field

title: Edit an existing company and see updates in the list
description: Verifies that a user can open a company, edit details, save, and see the updated values in the companies list.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the companies page
Click a company in the list
Fill Updated Company {{TIMESTAMP}} into the company name field
Verify the companies list includes "Updated Company {{TIMESTAMP}}"

title: Company creation with missing required field shows validation error
description: Verifies that company required fields are validated and saving is blocked when missing.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the companies page
Fill  into the company name field
Verify a validation error message is visible
Verify the new company is not added to the companies list

title: Delete a company and confirm it is removed from the list
description: Verifies that deleting a company removes it from the companies list after confirming the deletion.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the companies page
Verify the deleted company is removed from the companies list

title: Deals Pipeline loads kanban board
description: Verifies the pipeline page loads and displays deal stage columns with deal cards.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to the deals pipeline
Verify kanban columns for deal stages are displayed
Verify at least one deal card is displayed on the board

title: Move a deal card to another stage
description: Verifies a deal card can be moved from one stage column to another and remains there.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to the deals pipeline
Drag a deal card from the PROSPECTO stage column
Drop the deal card into the PROPUESTA_ENVIADA stage column
Verify the deal card is displayed in the PROPUESTA_ENVIADA stage column

title: Edit a deal from the board and save changes
description: Verifies deal details can be edited and saved from the pipeline, and the updated data is reflected on the board.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to the deals pipeline
Click a deal card to open its details
Fill 12345 into the deal value field
Verify the deal card displays the updated value 12345

title: Filter deals using search or filter controls
description: Verifies using the pipeline search/filter reduces the visible deal cards.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to the deals pipeline
Fill zzz-nonmatching-query into the search field
Verify an empty state message is visible for the board results

title: Create quote with one line item and see calculated totals
description: Verifies a quote can be created with line items and that subtotal, tax, and total are shown after saving.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to quotations
Click the action to create a new quote
Select a deal for the quote
Fill Test item into the line item description field
Fill 2 into the line item quantity field
Fill 100 into the line item price field
Verify the saved quote shows calculated subtotal, tax, and total
Verify the quote is present in the quotes list

title: Update quote status to ENVIADA
description: Verifies an existing quote status can be changed to ENVIADA and reflected in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to quotations
Click a quote from the list to open details
Select ENVIADA as the quote status
Verify the quote status is shown as ENVIADA in the quotes list

title: Prevent saving quote without line items
description: Verifies validation prevents saving a quote when no line items are provided.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to quotations
Click the action to create a new quote
Verify a validation error is visible indicating at least one line item is required

title: Delete a quote from quote details
description: Verifies a quote can be deleted after confirmation and is removed from the quotes list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to quotations
Click a quote from the list to open details
Click the action to delete the quote
Verify the quote is removed from the quotes list

title: Generate invoice from a quote or deal and see PENDIENTE status
description: Verifies an invoice can be generated and appears with status PENDIENTE.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to invoices
Click the action to create a new invoice
Select a quote or deal for the invoice
Click the action to generate the invoice
Verify a new invoice is present in the invoice list
Verify the new invoice shows status PENDIENTE

title: Mark an invoice as paid
description: Verifies an invoice can be marked as paid after confirmation and shows status PAGADA.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to invoices
Click an invoice from the list to open details
Click the action to mark the invoice as paid
Verify the invoice status is shown as PAGADA

title: Prevent generating invoice without required billing fields
description: Verifies validation prevents generating an invoice when required billing fields are missing.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to invoices
Click the action to create a new invoice
Click the action to generate the invoice
Verify a billing validation error is visible

title: Delete an invoice from invoice details
description: Verifies an invoice can be deleted after confirmation and is removed from the invoice list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the navigation link to invoices
Click an invoice from the list to open details
Click the action to delete the invoice
Verify the invoice is removed from the invoice list

title: Reports dashboard loads with metrics and charts
description: Verifies the reports page loads and displays key dashboard metrics and charts.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to reports
Verify deals and revenue charts are displayed

title: Reports date filter updates charts
description: Verifies applying a date range filter updates report charts to reflect the selected range.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to reports
Open the date range filter control
Verify the charts update to reflect the selected date range

title: Reports filter with no results shows empty state
description: Verifies applying a filter that yields no data shows an empty state on charts and related messages.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to reports
Open the date range filter control
Select a date range far in the past that is likely to contain no records
Verify a no-data state is displayed on the charts
Verify an empty state message is visible for the filtered results

title: Export report shows export confirmation
description: Verifies initiating report export results in an observable export confirmation in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to reports
Click the control to export or download the report
Verify an export confirmation is visible

title: Reports invalid date range shows validation error
description: Verifies selecting an invalid date range (end date before start date) surfaces a validation error.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to reports
Open the date range filter control
Select an end date that is earlier than the start date
Verify a date validation error is visible

title: Add interaction to a deal and see it in timeline
description: Verifies a user can add an interaction to a deal and see it appear in the deal timeline.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the pipeline
Open the interactions panel or tab
Fill interaction details with unique note text "Interaction {{TIMESTAMP}}"
Verify the new interaction appears in the deal timeline with text "Interaction {{TIMESTAMP}}"

title: Add reminder to a deal and see it listed
description: Verifies a user can add a reminder linked to a deal and see it listed for that deal.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the pipeline
Open the interactions panel or tab
Verify the reminder is listed for the deal

title: Interaction form required-field validation
description: Verifies leaving required interaction fields empty prevents saving and shows validation errors.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the pipeline
Open the interactions panel or tab
Save the interaction without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Cancel adding interaction does not create timeline entry
description: Verifies canceling the add-interaction workflow does not create a new interaction entry.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the pipeline
Open the interactions panel or tab
Fill interaction details with unique note text "Canceled interaction {{TIMESTAMP}}"
Verify no interaction entry with text "Canceled interaction {{TIMESTAMP}}" is present in the deal timeline

title: Cancel adding reminder does not create reminder entry
description: Verifies canceling the add-reminder workflow does not create a reminder entry for the deal.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to the pipeline
Open the interactions panel or tab
Verify the reminder list does not include a newly created reminder from the canceled workflow
